CustomField.description: Maps to Recurring_Donation__c.CardExpirationMonth__c on the Recurring Donation during data import processing. Stores the two-digit expiration month of the payment card.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the two-digit expiration month of the card used for this recurring donation (e.g., 01 for January).
CustomField.label: Recurring Donation Card Expiration Month
